projects.title: ag-analytics — AI Coding IDE Usage Analytics Platform
projects.description: A full-stack usage analytics platform for AI coding IDEs, featuring an interactive terminal UI, a zero-dependency web dashboard with SVG visualizations, and a Gemini-powered insights engine for cost optimization and efficiency scoring.
features: Built an interactive TUI with KPI cards, heatmaps, and bar charts for real-time analytics in the terminal
Engineered a zero-dependency HTTP web dashboard with SVG donut charts, GitHub-style activity heatmaps, and per-conversation deep-dive panels
Implemented an AI-powered insights engine using Gemini CLI for structured JSON analytics — including efficiency scoring across 6 dimensions and cost optimization recommendations
Designed model-aware cost estimation with tiered pricing tables spanning Claude, Gemini, and GPT models — with input/output/cached/reasoning token segmentation
Built a multi-layer data pipeline that scans JSONL conversation logs, extracts token usage metadata, tracks model switching events, and supports time-range filtering (24h, 7d, 30d)

projects.title: sdd-kit — Spec Driven Development CLI Toolkit
projects.description: A CLI toolkit that scaffolds a structured agent-assisted development workflow — auto-generating reusable agent skills, slash-command workflows, and coding rule templates to enforce traceability from idea through implementation to code review.
features: Created a Spec Driven Development CLI that scaffolds 8 reusable agent skill definitions, 5 slash-command workflows, and coding/commit rule templates
Designed a feature lifecycle management system with workspace initialization, feature creation, status tracking, health diagnostics, and cleanup
Enforced a structured idea → specify → implement → review → commit workflow with auto-generated agent skills and per-feature traceability
Built full non-interactive CI/CD compatibility supporting multi-feature parallel development under organized .sdd/ directories

projects.title: Intelligent Personal Assistant Robot
projects.description: A robotic assistant system featuring maze exploration, navigation simulation, and intelligent pathfinding algorithms.
features: Designed system architecture for intelligent assistant robot
Developed maze exploration algorithm using Python and Flask
Implemented simulation for navigation with C# and Unity Game Engine
Applied backtracking technique optimized with dynamic programming for maze solving

projects.title: Professional Email Service API
projects.description: A clean, secure, and production-ready Node.js and Express.js REST API for sending emails via Gmail SMTP.
features: Modular clean architecture with separation of concerns across controllers, services, routes, and middleware
Gmail SMTP integration with full support for multiple recipients (TO, CC, BCC)
Robust input validation and sanitization using Express-Validator
Security enhancements via Helmet, CORS configuration, rate limiting, and environment-based settings
Health check endpoints for service monitoring and SMTP status verification
Comprehensive test coverage including validation, error handling, and endpoint tests
Production-ready deployment with logging, error handling, and compatibility with platforms like Render or Heroku

projects.title: Shape Run - 2D Endless Runner Android Game
projects.description: A free offline 2D endless runner game built with Unity and C#, featuring innovative dual-shape control mechanics, global leaderboards, achievements, and monetization via Google AdMob.
features: Designed, developed, and released a 2D endless runner game for Android using Unity and C#
Implemented dual-shape control mechanics for unique and engaging gameplay
Integrated Google Play Services for global leaderboards and achievements, enabling worldwide competition
Enabled score sharing on social media platforms for enhanced player engagement
Added Google AdMob for in-game monetization, providing a sustainable revenue stream
